title: Media Eject Control Triplet (0x45)
description: Media Eject Control triplet. Triplet length includes the length and TID bytes; payload starts at offset 2. Offset 2 is reserved and should be zero.

elements.name: Reserved
elements.description: Reserved byte; should be zero. Present for alignment and future use.

enumMap.03: Conditional eject to next front-side partition
enumMap.04: Conditional eject to next back-side partition

notes: TID for this triplet is X'45'. Length is typically 4 (length + TID + Reserved + EjCtrl).
